message:
feat: pass keyboard input to browser, add npm package

Keyboard:
- All keys now pass through to browser via CDP Input.dispatchKeyEvent
- Only Ctrl+Q/W/C (quit), Ctrl+L (address bar), Ctrl+R (reload) handled by termweb
- Remove vim-style scrolling (j/k/d/u) and form mode hotkeys

npm package:
- Add package.json for npm publishing
- Add bin/termweb.js CLI wrapper
- Add scripts/install.js to download platform binaries
- Add .github/workflows/release.yml for automated builds

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,70 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    strategy:
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: macos-latest
+            arch: aarch64
+            name: termweb-macos-aarch64
+          - os: macos-13
+            arch: x86_64
+            name: termweb-macos-x86_64
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            arch: x86_64
+            name: termweb-linux-x86_64
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            arch: aarch64
+            name: termweb-linux-aarch64
+
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Zig
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.13.0
+
+      - name: Build (native)
+        if: matrix.arch == 'x86_64' || (matrix.os == 'macos-latest' && matrix.arch == 'aarch64')
+        run: zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+
+      - name: Build (cross-compile Linux aarch64)
+        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' && matrix.arch == 'aarch64'
+        run: zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Dtarget=aarch64-linux-gnu
+
+      - name: Rename binary
+        run: mv zig-out/bin/termweb ${{ matrix.name }}
+
+      - name: Upload artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ matrix.name }}
+          path: ${{ matrix.name }}
+
+  release:
+    needs: build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Download all artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+
+      - name: Create Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
+        with:
+          files: |
+            termweb-macos-aarch64/termweb-macos-aarch64
+            termweb-macos-x86_64/termweb-macos-x86_64
+            termweb-linux-x86_64/termweb-linux-x86_64
+            termweb-linux-aarch64/termweb-linux-aarch64

@@ -18,3 +18,7 @@ termweb_input.log
 
 # Test files
 test_*
+
+# npm binaries (downloaded during install)
+binaries/
+node_modules/

@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+{
+  "name": "termweb",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol",
+  "bin": {
+    "termweb": "./bin/termweb.js"
+  },
+  "scripts": {
+    "postinstall": "node scripts/install.js"
+  },
+  "keywords": [
+    "terminal",
+    "browser",
+    "kitty",
+    "graphics",
+    "cli",
+    "web"
+  ],
+  "author": "teamch",
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "repository": {
+    "type": "git",
+    "url": "https://github.com/teamch/termweb"
+  },
+  "publishConfig": {
+    "access": "public"
+  },
+  "engines": {
+    "node": ">=16"
+  },
+  "os": [
+    "darwin",
+    "linux"
+  ],
+  "cpu": [
+    "x64",
+    "arm64"
+  ]
+}
